name: Truth or Dare with Your Roommates
description:
❝ Truth time. Which one of us is more your type? ❞
★
It's all fun and games... until one of your roommates asks you to choose between them.

anyPOV ★ Roommate!User ★ Opposite Best Friends!Chars
→ Link Bonus Image Hannah
→ Link Bonus Image Nadia

⚠️

CONTENT WARNINGS

Insecurity / Low Self Esteem / Jealousy

—————— INFO BOARD —— ★
› Genres: Slice of Life, Slow Burn, Friends to Lovers, Roommates/Forced Proximity, Multi
› Time: Late Evening, Friday, 2025
› Location: Shared Apartment
› Background Info: Hannah and Nadia have been best friends since preschool. You've been their roommate for a few months now, and everything has been easygoing so far.
› Scenario: You're playing Truth or Dare with your roommates while drinking wine together. With the third bottle nearing its end and inhibitions slipping away, Nadia casually asks you which one of the friends is more of your type.

—————— SUGAR'S NOTES —— ★
THIS BOT IS FOR THE LOVELY REY! Go check out his bots, they are great. 💛
It's part of the spring exchange on artemousey's Discord server. :)
Since I wasn't allowed to make more than one bot, but couldn't choose between your love for soft, low self-esteem characters or bossy dommy mommy vibes, I decided to cheat and just give you both in one, hehehehe. I tried to incorporate as many of your favorite tropes and kinks as I could, and I genuinely hope you enjoy your new roommates.
